		<mdOwnedViews/>
		<text>&lt;html&gt;
  &lt;head&gt;
		&lt;style&gt;
			p {padding:0px; margin:0px;}
		&lt;/style&gt;
	&lt;/head&gt;
  &lt;body&gt;
    &lt;p&gt;
&lt;b&gt;In software and systems engineering&lt;/b&gt;, a use case is a list of steps, typically defining interactions between an actor and a system, to achieve a goal. The actor can be a human or an external system.
    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
&amp;#160;
    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
&lt;b&gt;In systems engineering&lt;/b&gt;, use cases are used at a higher level than within software engineering, often representing missions or stakeholder goals. The detailed requirements may then be captured in SysML or as contractual statements.

    &lt;/p&gt;

  &lt;/body&gt;
&lt;/html&gt;
</text>

				<packagedElement xmi:type='uml:Package' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854445_44881_5256' name='Implementation View'>
					<ownedComment xmi:type='uml:Comment' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854319_874862_4838' body='Implementation view describes systems high-level architecture, identifies system components.&#10;&#10;The implementation view describes the implementation artifacts of logical subsystems defined in the structural&#10;view. It may include the intermediate artifacts used in a system construction (code files, libraries, data files, etc.)&#10;This view defines dependencies between the implementation components and their connections by the&#10;required and provided interfaces. Components and their relationships are displayed on the Component diagram.&#10;Inner parts of the component can be represented with the Composite structure diagrams. The implementation&#10;view helps analyze system parts and their dependencies in a higher component level.&#10;'>
						<annotatedElement xmi:idref='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854445_44881_5256'/>
					</ownedComment>
					<xmi:Extension extender='MagicDraw UML 19.0 beta'>

					</xmi:Extension>
				</packagedElement>
				<packagedElement xmi:type='uml:Package' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854329_706033_4896' name='Environment View'>
					<ownedComment xmi:type='uml:Comment' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854313_245794_4808' body='The environment view represents the physical arrangement of a system, such as computers and devices&#10;(nodes) and how they are connected to each other. In contrast to the component view, the deployment view is&#10;concerned with the physical structure of the system and the location of the software modules (components)&#10;manifested by artifacts within the system.&#10;The environment view is displayed on the deployment diagram that is called the implementation diagram in&#10;MagicDrawTM UML.&#10;'>
						<annotatedElement xmi:idref='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854329_706033_4896'/>
					</ownedComment>

In contrast to the component view, the deployment view is&#10;concerned with the physical structure of the system and the location of the software modules (components)&#10;manifested by artifacts within the system.&#10;The environment view is displayed on the deployment diagram that is called the implementation diagram in&#10;MagicDrawTM UML.&#10;'>

				</packagedElement>
				<packagedElement xmi:type='uml:Package' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854388_384634_5125' name='Structural View'>
					<ownedComment xmi:type='uml:Comment' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854440_661583_5208' body='The structural view represents structural elements for implementing a solution for defined requirements. It identifies&#10;all of the business entities and how these entities are related to each other. Usually entities are represented&#10;as classifiers and their instances in class and object diagrams in multiple abstraction levels. System&#10;decomposition to different layers can be displayed using Package diagrams. A Composite structure diagram&#10;can be used to represent the classifier inner structure. The system structural view artifacts are created by software&#10;architects and represent the system implementation design solutions.'>
						<annotatedElement xmi:idref='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854388_384634_5125'/>
					</ownedComment>
					<xmi:Extension extender='MagicDraw UML 19.0 beta'>

								<ownedComment xmi:type='uml:Comment' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854313_396784_4796' body='The structural view represents structural elements for implementing a solution for defined requirements. It identifies&#10;all of the business entities and how these entities are related to each other. Usually entities are represented&#10;as classifiers and their instances in class and object diagrams in multiple abstraction levels. System&#10;decomposition to different layers can be displayed using Package diagrams. A Composite structure diagram&#10;can be used to represent the classifier inner structure. The system structural view artifacts are created by software&#10;architects and represent the system implementation design solutions.'>
									<annotatedElement xmi:idref='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854466_272927_5308'/>

				</packagedElement>
				<packagedElement xmi:type='uml:Package' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854319_863783_4840' name='Behavioral View'>
					<ownedComment xmi:type='uml:Comment' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854440_993384_5216' body='The dynamic behavior of the system is displayed on the Interaction (sequence and collaboration), State, Activity,&#10;Interaction overview, and Timing diagrams. It focuses mainly on the interactions that occur between objects&#10;inside a system, activities and work performed by the various parts of a system, and state changes within a particular&#10;object or collaboration. Rather than defining the participants of the system, it defines how particular use&#10;cases are executed, which provides value for the external user. The dynamic view is concerned about what is&#10;happening inside the system and how those actions impact other participants.&#10;'>
						<annotatedElement xmi:idref='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854319_863783_4840'/>
					</ownedComment>
					<xmi:Extension extender='MagicDraw UML 19.0 beta'>
						<modelExtension>

								<xmi:Extension extender='MagicDraw UML 19.0 beta'>

It focuses mainly on the interactions that occur between objects&#10;inside a system, activities and work performed by the various parts of a system, and state changes within a particular&#10;object or collaboration. Rather than defining the participants of the system, it defines how particular use&#10;cases are executed, which provides value for the external user. The dynamic view is concerned about what is&#10;happening inside the system and how those actions impact other participants.&#10;'>

				<packagedElement xmi:type='uml:Package' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854331_179529_4910' name='Use Case View'>
					<ownedComment xmi:type='uml:Comment' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854428_677363_5164' body='The use case view represents the functionality and behavior of a system or subsystem as it is perceived by&#10;external users. The use case view is central because the contents drive the development of the other views. '>
						<annotatedElement xmi:idref='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854331_179529_4910'/>
					</ownedComment>

								<ownedComment xmi:type='uml:Comment' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854450_229368_5267' body='The use case view represents the functionality and behavior of a system or subsystem as it is perceived by external users. 								<ownedComment xmi:type='uml:Comment' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854351_907581_4993' body='When analyzing/gathering software requirements it is critical to understand domain terms – concepts and their relationships.&#10;&#10;Domain concepts can be described:&#10;in a glossary&#10;they can be modeled by using simplified UML class diagrams by just using classes, associations, and multiplicities.'>
									<annotatedElement xmi:idref='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854375_241214_5075'/>
								</ownedComment>
							</ownedDiagram>
						</modelExtension>
					</xmi:Extension>
					<packagedElement xmi:type='uml:Class' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854481_378751_5348' name='Class'>
						<ownedComment xmi:type='uml:Comment' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854329_303060_4885' body='Class&#10;A classifier that describes of a set of objects that share the same specifications of features, constraints, and semantics.&#10;&#10;Class is displayed as a rectangle, divided into compartments: &#10;Name (singular noun, unique)&#10;Attributes&#10;Operations&#10;Structure&#10;&#10;You can show or hide compartments or their elements, depending on how much details you model.&#10;'>
							<annotatedElement xmi:idref='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854481_378751_5348'/>
						</ownedComment>
						<generalization xmi:type='uml:Generalization' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854450_173913_5261' general='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854334_17726_4913'>
							<ownedComment xmi:type='uml:Comment' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854362_204396_5015' body='Generalization'>
								<annotatedElement xmi:idref='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854450_173913_5261'/>
							</ownedComment>
						</generalization>
						<interfaceRealization xmi:type='uml:InterfaceRealization' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854431_32058_5187' contract='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854445_413234_5243'>
							<client xmi:idref='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854481_378751_5348'/>
							<supplier xmi:idref='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854445_413234_5243'/>
						</interfaceRealization>
						<ownedAttribute xmi:type='uml:Property' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854329_414441_4871' name='attribute' visibility='public'>
							<ownedComment xmi:type='uml:Comment' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854345_532409_4960' body='An association specifies a semantic relationship that can occur between typed instances. It has at least two ends&#10;represented by properties, each of which is connected to the type of the end. More than one end of the association may&#10;have the same type.&#10;An end property of an association that is owned by an end class or that is a navigable owned end of the association&#10;indicates that the association is navigable from the opposite ends; otherwise, the association is not navigable from the&#10;opposite ends.&#10;&#10;Major Property properties:&#10;Visibility (+ public, # protected, ~ package, - private)&#10;Name&#10;Type&#10;Multiplicity&#10;Default value&#10;Properties (static, read only, ordered, derived, …)&#10;'>
								<annotatedElement xmi:idref='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854329_414441_4871'/>
							</ownedComment>
						</ownedAttribute>
						<ownedAttribute xmi:type='uml:Property' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854341_369754_4923' name='class2' visibility='private' type='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854463_930753_5291' association='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854466_600429_5301'>
							<ownedComment xmi:type='uml:Comment' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854327_320019_4855' body='A multiplicity element embeds this information to specify the allowable cardinalities for an instantiation of this element.&#10;'>
								<annotatedElement xmi:idref='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854341_369754_4923'/>
							</ownedComment>
							<lowerValue xmi:type='uml:LiteralInteger' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854431_329297_5189'/>
							<xmi:Extension extender='MagicDraw UML 19.0 beta'>
								<modelExtension>
									<upperValue xmi:type='uml:LiteralUnlimitedNatural' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854481_863278_5345' value='1'/>
								</modelExtension>
							</xmi:Extension>
						</ownedAttribute>
						<ownedAttribute xmi:type='uml:Property' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854444_304838_5232' visibility='private' aggregation='shared' type='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854383_29202_5089' association='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854344_174105_4952'/>
						<ownedAttribute xmi:type='uml:Property' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854305_198032_4736' visibility='private' aggregation='composite' type='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854305_436433_4743' association='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854422_709260_5150'/>
						<ownedOperation xmi:type='uml:Operation' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854329_984570_4888' name='operation' visibility='public'>
							<ownedComment xmi:type='uml:Comment' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854440_398817_5205' body='A behavioral feature of a classifier that specifies the name, type, parameters, and constraints for invoking an associated behavior.&#10;'>
								<annotatedElement xmi:idref='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854329_984570_4888'/>
							</ownedComment>
						</ownedOperation>
					</packagedElement>
					<packagedElement xmi:type='uml:Class' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854334_17726_4913' name='Superclass'>
						<ownedAttribute xmi:type='uml:Property' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854386_175894_5118' name='commonAttribute' visibility='public'/>
						<ownedOperation xmi:type='uml:Operation' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854463_124997_5292' name='commonOperation' visibility='public'/>
					</packagedElement>
					<packagedElement xmi:type='uml:Class' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854463_930753_5291' name='Class2'/>
					<packagedElement xmi:type='uml:Association' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854466_600429_5301' name='association'>
						<memberEnd xmi:idref='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854341_369754_4923'/>

						<ownedComment xmi:type='uml:Comment' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854453_330500_5272' body='An association specifies a semantic relationship that can occur between typed instances. It has at least two ends&#10;represented by properties, each of which is connected to the type of the end. More than one end of the association may have the same type.&#10;&#10;An instance of an association is called a link.&#10;'>
							<annotatedElement xmi:idref='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854466_600429_5301'/>
						</ownedComment>
						<ownedEnd xmi:type='uml:Property' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854345_829927_4966' visibility='private' type='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854481_378751_5348' association='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854466_600429_5301'>
							<ownedComment xmi:type='uml:Comment' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854431_762057_5195' body='A multiplicity element embeds this information to specify the allowable cardinalities for an instantiation of this element.'>
								<annotatedElement xmi:idref='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854345_829927_4966'/>
							</ownedComment>

						</ownedEnd>

							<value xmi:type='uml:LiteralString' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854342_364896_4931' value='real value'/>
						</slot>
						<slot xmi:type='uml:Slot' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854306_59703_4786' definingFeature='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854386_175894_5118'>
							<value xmi:type='uml:LiteralString' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854431_274564_5193' value='common'/>
						</slot>
					</packagedElement>
					<packagedElement xmi:type='uml:InstanceSpecification' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854373_132888_5067' name='name2'>
						<classifier xmi:idref='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854481_378751_5348'/>
						<slot xmi:type='uml:Slot' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854428_674002_5163' definingFeature='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854329_414441_4871'>
							<value xmi:type='uml:LiteralString' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854481_803542_5351' value='value'/>
						</slot>
					</packagedElement>
					<packagedElement xmi:type='uml:Class' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854383_29202_5089' name='Class3'>
						<ownedAttribute xmi:type='uml:Property' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854479_775319_5339' visibility='private' type='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854481_378751_5348' association='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854344_174105_4952'/>
					</packagedElement>
					<packagedElement xmi:type='uml:Association' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854344_174105_4952' name='Aggregation'>
						<memberEnd xmi:idref='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854444_304838_5232'/>
						<memberEnd xmi:idref='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854479_775319_5339'/>
						<ownedComment xmi:type='uml:Comment' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854445_952777_5249' body='Aggregation An aggregation is an association that represents a whole-part relationship.&#10;&#10;'>
							<annotatedElement xmi:idref='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854344_174105_4952'/>
						</ownedComment>
					</packagedElement>
					<packagedElement xmi:type='uml:Class' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854305_436433_4743' name='Domain model element'>
						<ownedAttribute xmi:type='uml:Property' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854477_318192_5310' visibility='private' type='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854481_378751_5348' association='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854422_709260_5150'/>
					</packagedElement>
					<packagedElement xmi:type='uml:Association' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854422_709260_5150' name='Composition'>
						<memberEnd xmi:idref='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854305_198032_4736'/>
						<memberEnd xmi:idref='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854477_318192_5310'/>
						<ownedComment xmi:type='uml:Comment' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854351_988337_5002' body='Composition A composition is a form of aggregation with a stronger ownership and coincident lifetime of part with the whole.'>
							<annotatedElement xmi:idref='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854422_709260_5150'/>
						</ownedComment>
					</packagedElement>
					<packagedElement xmi:type='uml:Enumeration' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854329_180586_4874' name='Enumeration'>
						<ownedComment xmi:type='uml:Comment' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854386_408299_5098' body='A kind of data type, whose instances may be any of a number of user-defined enumeration literals&#10;'>
							<annotatedElement xmi:idref='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854329_180586_4874'/>
						</ownedComment>
						<ownedLiteral xmi:type='uml:EnumerationLiteral' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854439_859142_5197' name='EnumerationLiteral0'>
							<ownedComment xmi:type='uml:Comment' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854313_928680_4816' body='Is a user-defined data value for an enumeration&#10;'>
								<annotatedElement xmi:idref='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854439_859142_5197'/>
							</ownedComment>
						</ownedLiteral>
						<ownedLiteral xmi:type='uml:EnumerationLiteral' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854350_792526_4985' name='EnumerationLiteral1'/>
					</packagedElement>

									</xmi:Extension>
									<ownedComment xmi:type='uml:Comment' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854373_236448_5062' body='The State Machine diagram:&#10;&#10;-  shows all the possible states that a particular business entity, class or component may have, and the events that cause the state to change.&#10;&#10;- Is concerned about internal object changes&#10;   * As opposed to sequence diagrams that are concerned with events between objects&#10;&#10;- Usually used to describe a class with complex behavior&#10;&#10;- Less usual, state machines can be used for describing process (or interaction) states&#10;'>
										<annotatedElement xmi:idref='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854313_367384_4833'/>
									</ownedComment>
								</ownedDiagram>
							</modelExtension>
						</xmi:Extension>
						<nestedClassifier xmi:type='uml:Signal' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854481_492312_5346' name='Signal'/>
						<region xmi:type='uml:Region' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854431_728453_5170' visibility='public'>
							<subvertex xmi:type='uml:Pseudostate' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854305_816022_4726' name='Initial State' visibility='public'>
								<ownedComment xmi:type='uml:Comment' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854344_63367_4939' body='Initial state denotes object creation&#10;'>
									<annotatedElement xmi:idref='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854305_816022_4726'/>
								</ownedComment>
							</subvertex>
							<subvertex xmi:type='uml:State' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854409_920167_5136' name='State' visibility='public'>
								<ownedComment xmi:type='uml:Comment' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854306_665515_4770' body='Models a situation during which some (usually implicit) invariant condition holds&#10;&#10;Three standard events are predefined:&#10;entry – an optional action that is executed whenever the state is entered regardless of the transition taken to reach the state.&#10;exit - an optional action that is executed whenever this state is exited.&#10;Whenever a state is entered it executes its entry action before any other action is executed. Whenever a state is exited, it executes its exit action as the final step prior to leaving the state.&#10;do – Activity that is executed while being in this state. This activity is forked as a concurrent activity at the instant when the entry action of the state is completed. If the activity completes while the state is still active, it raises a completion event. Upon exit, the activity is terminated before the exit action is executed (i.e. the activity is aborted prior to its completion).&#10;On some event condition means that some activity is performed when specified event occurs.&#10;The action expression tells which action should be performed (e.g. operation calls, attribute values increment etc.)&#10;'>
									<annotatedElement xmi:idref='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854409_920167_5136'/>
								</ownedComment>
								<doActivity xmi:type='uml:Activity' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854477_329778_5324' name='Do Activity'/>
							</subvertex>
							<subvertex xmi:type='uml:State' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854327_175163_4845' name='Composite State' visibility='public'>
								<ownedComment xmi:type='uml:Comment' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854362_32178_5018' body='Any state can have its own internal states.&#10;A composite state contains sub-states'>
									<annotatedElement xmi:idref='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854327_175163_4845'/>
								</ownedComment>
								<region xmi:type='uml:Region' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854431_112257_5177' visibility='public'>
									<subvertex xmi:type='uml:State' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854306_5127_4756' name='Substate1' visibility='public'/>
									<subvertex xmi:type='uml:State' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854440_61454_5222' name='Substate2' visibility='public'/>
									<transition xmi:type='uml:Transition' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854308_726826_4789' visibility='public' source='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854306_5127_4756' target='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854440_61454_5222'/>
									<transition xmi:type='uml:Transition' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854386_816871_5111' visibility='public' source='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854440_61454_5222' target='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854306_5127_4756'/>
								</region>
							</subvertex>
							<subvertex xmi:type='uml:Pseudostate' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854372_227460_5048' name='Choice' visibility='public' kind='choice'/>
							<subvertex xmi:type='uml:FinalState' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854344_398096_4941' name='Final State' visibility='public'>
								<ownedComment xmi:type='uml:Comment' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854305_212916_4745' body='Final state denotes object destruction or process end&#10;'>
									<annotatedElement xmi:idref='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854344_398096_4941'/>
								</ownedComment>
							</subvertex>
							<transition xmi:type='uml:Transition' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854386_406480_5100' visibility='public' source='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854305_816022_4726' target='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854409_920167_5136'>
								<ownedComment xmi:type='uml:Comment' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854445_675076_5247' body='Transitions are always triggered by events:&#10;- CallEvent&#10;&#9;draw(f, c)&#10;- SignalEvent&#10;&#9;Login&#10;- TimeEvent&#10;&#9;after(5 min); at (Jan 1, 2007)&#10;- ChangeEvent&#10;&#9;when (age &gt; 21)&#10;'>
									<annotatedElement xmi:idref='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854386_406480_5100'/>
								</ownedComment>
								<trigger xmi:type='uml:Trigger' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854329_422898_4889' visibility='public' event='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854361_803222_5006'/>
							</transition>
							<transition xmi:type='uml:Transition' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854306_367011_4773' visibility='public' source='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854409_920167_5136' target='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854372_227460_5048'/>
							<transition xmi:type='uml:Transition' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854331_710821_4906' visibility='public' guard='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854305_799793_4724' source='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854372_227460_5048' target='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854306_5127_4756'>
								<ownedRule xmi:type='uml:Constraint' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854305_799793_4724'>
									<specification xmi:type='uml:OpaqueExpression' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854481_943465_5342'>
										<body>condition1</body>
									</specification>
								</ownedRule>
							</transition>
							<transition xmi:type='uml:Transition' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854391_539431_5131' visibility='public' guard='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854466_227235_5303' source='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854372_227460_5048' target='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854440_61454_5222'>
								<ownedRule xmi:type='uml:Constraint' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854466_227235_5303'>
									<specification xmi:type='uml:OpaqueExpression' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854444_550505_5234'>
										<body>condition2</body>
									</specification>
								</ownedRule>
							</transition>
							<transition xmi:type='uml:Transition' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854440_252517_5220' visibility='public' source='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854327_175163_4845' target='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854344_398096_4941'>
								<trigger xmi:type='uml:Trigger' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854444_382311_5235' visibility='public' event='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854313_140725_4827'/>
							</transition>
						</region>
					</packagedElement>
					<packagedElement xmi:type='uml:Abstraction' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393588544273_239600_10972'>
						<client xmi:idref='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854440_360418_5223'/>
						<supplier xmi:idref='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393588306585_689856_10305'/>
					</packagedElement>
					<packagedElement xmi:type='uml:SignalEvent' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854361_803222_5006' signal='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854481_492312_5346'/>
					<packagedElement xmi:type='uml:TimeEvent' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854313_140725_4827' isRelative='true'>
						<when xmi:type='uml:TimeExpression' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854327_198370_4859'>
							<expr xmi:type='uml:LiteralString' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854305_8910_4748' value='2 years'/>
						</when>
					</packagedElement>
				</packagedElement>
				<packagedElement xmi:type='uml:Package' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854418_119544_5142' name='Use Case diagram'>

					<packagedElement xmi:type='uml:Actor' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854329_480516_4877' name='Abstract Actor' isAbstract='true'>

					<packagedElement xmi:type='uml:Package' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854440_425413_5225' name='Actors'/>
					<packagedElement xmi:type='uml:Package' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854382_863076_5085' name='Functional Package'>
						<packagedElement xmi:type='uml:UseCase' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854445_763989_5253' name='Use Case' classifierBehavior='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854481_114753_5353'>
							<ownedComment xmi:type='uml:Comment' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854440_241396_5204' body='The specification of a set of actions performed by a system, which yields an observable result that is, typically, of value for one or more actors or other stakeholders of the system.&#10;&#10;- Captures some actor-visible function&#10;- Achieves a discrete goal for the actor&#10;- Specifies complete functionality&#10;- Is named using a verb-noun combination, “do this to that”&#10;  - 2-5 words is recommended name length&#10;  - More details can be provided in description&#10;'>
								<annotatedElement xmi:idref='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854445_763989_5253'/>
							</ownedComment>
							<ownedBehavior xmi:type='uml:Activity' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854481_114753_5353' name='Use Case'>

							<extend xmi:type='uml:Extend' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854362_910142_5023' visibility='public' extendedCase='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854445_763989_5253'>

								<ownedComment xmi:type='uml:Comment' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854386_683288_5103' body='specifies that the behavior of a use case may be extended by the behavior of another (usually supplementary) use case.&#10;'>
									<annotatedElement xmi:idref='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854362_910142_5023'/>
								</ownedComment>

							<generalization xmi:type='uml:Generalization' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854466_688714_5305' general='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854372_425176_5050'/>
						</packagedElement>
						<packagedElement xmi:type='uml:UseCase' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854383_924574_5090' name='UC2'>
							<generalization xmi:type='uml:Generalization' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854466_107472_5304' general='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854372_425176_5050'/>
						</packagedElement>
					</packagedElement>
					<packagedElement xmi:type='uml:Actor' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854386_775963_5119' name='Actor1'>
						<ownedComment xmi:type='uml:Comment' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854463_867033_5289' body='Specifies a role played by a user or any other system that interacts with the subject.&#10;- Named by a singular noun&#10;- Is external to the system being specified&#10;- Actors may not be physical entities&#10;- Actors are modeled to ensure that the entire functionality of the system is described!&#10;&#10;&#10;*Primary actors – people using the main system functions&#10;*Secondary actors – people performing system administration or maintenance&#10;*Actors-systems – external systems, using the created system or used by the created system&#10;*External hardware and software – programs or devices that are external to the system but interact with the system by providing input or receiving output&#10;'>
							<annotatedElement xmi:idref='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854386_775963_5119'/>
						</ownedComment>
						<generalization xmi:type='uml:Generalization' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854362_348669_5019' general='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854329_480516_4877'>
							<ownedComment xmi:type='uml:Comment' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854479_643538_5338' body='If two (or more) actors share common use cases then you can define a parent actor for them and associate it with their common use cases&#10;'>
								<annotatedElement xmi:idref='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854362_348669_5019'/>
							</ownedComment>
						</generalization>
					</packagedElement>

						<generalization xmi:type='uml:Generalization' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854313_996003_4819' general='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854329_480516_4877'/>

									</xmi:Extension>
									<ownedComment xmi:type='uml:Comment' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854327_442696_4856' body='Use case is implemented by a sequence of actions between an actor and the system (interaction).&#10;Depending actor’s actions, entered data, and system context there can be many use case scenarios.&#10;The most frequent scenario of a use case is called the primary scenario (also known as “happy day” scenario). All other scenarios are called alternative scenarios.&#10;It is recommended to model complex use cases (usually with several scenarios) using UML activity diagram. It is easier to understand graphical representation of the flow of events than textual descriptions.&#10;'>
										<annotatedElement xmi:idref='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854354_775840_5005'/>
									</ownedComment>
								</ownedDiagram>
							</modelExtension>
						</xmi:Extension>

						<edge xmi:type='uml:ObjectFlow' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854341_268080_4916' name='Object flow' visibility='public' source='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854345_250883_4974' target='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854306_385917_4769'>
							<ownedComment xmi:type='uml:Comment' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854327_155912_4857' body='Is an activity edge that can have objects or data passing along it.&#10;'>

							</ownedComment>

						</edge>
						<edge xmi:type='uml:ControlFlow' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854444_563431_5228' visibility='public' source='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854440_633888_5212' target='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854428_188512_5165'>

							<weight xmi:type='uml:LiteralUnlimitedNatural' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854481_831903_5352' value='1'/>
						</edge>
						<node xmi:type='uml:InitialNode' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854422_891782_5154' name='Initial Node' visibility='public'>
							<ownedComment xmi:type='uml:Comment' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854372_54886_5037' body='Initial node shows the beginning of the collaboration&#10;&#10;Initial node may have only outgoing transitions&#10;&#10;There may be only one initial node in activity diagram&#10;'>
								<annotatedElement xmi:idref='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854422_891782_5154'/>
							</ownedComment>
						</node>
						<node xmi:type='uml:DecisionNode' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854440_572796_5210' name='Decision' visibility='public'>
							<ownedComment xmi:type='uml:Comment' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854383_826585_5092' body='Is a control node that chooses between outgoing flows.&#10;Must have one edge entering it and multiple activity edges with different guards leaving it.&#10;'>
								<annotatedElement xmi:idref='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854440_572796_5210'/>
							</ownedComment>
						</node>
						<node xmi:type='uml:CallBehaviorAction' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854431_276247_5182' name='Parallel Action2' visibility='public'/>
						<node xmi:type='uml:CallBehaviorAction' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854466_586774_5307' name='Action1' visibility='public'>
							<ownedComment xmi:type='uml:Comment' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854319_229909_4834' body='Represents a single step within an activity.&#10;The execution of an action represents some transformation or processing in the modeled system, be it a computer system or otherwise.&#10;An action may have sets of incoming and outgoing activity edges that specify control flow and data flow from and to other nodes.&#10;An action will not begin execution until all of its input conditions are satisfied'>
								<annotatedElement xmi:idref='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854466_586774_5307'/>
							</ownedComment>
						</node>
						<node xmi:type='uml:MergeNode' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854319_942603_4837' name='Merge' visibility='public'>
							<ownedComment xmi:type='uml:Comment' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854329_459029_4892' body='Is a control node that brings together multiple alternate flows.&#10;Used to to accept one among several alternate synchronous flows.&#10;Must have two or more edges entering it and a single activity edge leaving it.&#10;'>
								<annotatedElement xmi:idref='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854319_942603_4837'/>
							</ownedComment>
						</node>
						<node xmi:type='uml:ActivityFinalNode' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854466_894274_5299' name='Activity Final' visibility='public'>
							<ownedComment xmi:type='uml:Comment' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854382_818583_5086' body='Activity Final denotes the end of the whole activity&#10;'>
								<annotatedElement xmi:idref='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854466_894274_5299'/>
							</ownedComment>
						</node>

					<packagedElement xmi:type='uml:Component' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854329_855805_4881' name='Component'>
						<ownedComment xmi:type='uml:Comment' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854327_200712_4850' body='Represents a modular part of a system that encapsulates its contents and whose manifestation is replaceable within its environment.&#10;&#10;Component can define:&#10;- Interfaces that are visible to other components&#10;- Interfaces that are required for component&#10;&#10;'>
							<annotatedElement xmi:idref='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854329_855805_4881'/>
						</ownedComment>

								<ownedComment xmi:type='uml:Comment' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854445_872363_5252' body='Deployment diagram is physical description of the system topology&#10;&#10;Shows the hardware nodes of a system, the connections between the nodes, and the software components deployed on them&#10;'>

				<packagedElement xmi:type='uml:Package' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854305_965644_4723' name='Sequence Diagram'>
					<packagedElement xmi:type='uml:Collaboration' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854447_320927_5257' name='UML Sequence diagram' classifierBehavior='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854450_215234_5259'>
						<ownedComment xmi:type='uml:Comment' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854351_513845_4990' body='The Sequence diagram focuses on the Message interchange between a number of elements which participates in interaction.&#10;&#10;Lifeline is shown as a box at the top with a dashed vertical line. Line shows when the object exists&#10;- An arrow shows that one lifeline has sent a message to another lifeline, this is usually some kind of method call&#10;- Recursive message is a call to the same method from it&#10;- Message to self is a call to any of the operations in the same class&#10;- Destruction marks shows the lifeline destruction time&#10;- Activation represents the period during which an lifeline performs an operation either directly or through a subordinate operation'>
							<annotatedElement xmi:idref='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854447_320927_5257'/>
						</ownedComment>
						<ownedBehavior xmi:type='uml:Interaction' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854450_215234_5259' name='UML Sequence diagram '>

										<ownedComment xmi:type='uml:Comment' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854386_423878_5116' body='The Sequence diagram focuses on the Message interchange between a number of elements which participates in interaction.&#10;&#10;Lifeline is shown as a box at the top with a dashed vertical line. Line shows when the object exists&#10;- An arrow shows that one lifeline has sent a message to another lifeline, this is usually some kind of method call&#10;- Recursive message is a call to the same method from it&#10;- Message to self is a call to any of the operations in the same class&#10;- Destruction marks shows the lifeline destruction time&#10;&#10;Activation represents the period during which an lifeline performs an operation either directly or through a subordinate operation'>
											<annotatedElement xmi:idref='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854479_436005_5340'/>
										</ownedComment>
									</ownedDiagram>
								</modelExtension>
							</xmi:Extension>

								<ownedComment xmi:type='uml:Comment' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854372_714857_5047' body='A lifeline represents an individual participant in the Interaction.&#10;Usually, instance of classifier sending and receiving messages'>

							<message xmi:type='uml:Message' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854313_471889_4793' name='synchronous operation()' visibility='public' receiveEvent='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854477_702682_5322' sendEvent='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854454_40176_5278'>
								<ownedComment xmi:type='uml:Comment' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854329_890034_4863' body='you expect response from an object.&#10;Object that has sent a message is waiting for a response and may not perform any actions.'>
									<annotatedElement xmi:idref='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854313_471889_4793'/>
								</ownedComment>
							</message>
							<message xmi:type='uml:Message' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854372_166418_5039' name='reply message' visibility='public' messageSort='reply' receiveEvent='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854445_839316_5245' sendEvent='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854445_431821_5239'>
								<ownedComment xmi:type='uml:Comment' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854372_338146_5040' body='The return arrow can be suppressed, because it is at the end of the activation bar. But showing it can prevent a lot of confusion.'>
									<annotatedElement xmi:idref='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854372_166418_5039'/>
								</ownedComment>
							</message>
							<message xmi:type='uml:Message' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854445_117505_5254' name='asynchronous signal' visibility='public' messageSort='asynchSignal' receiveEvent='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854351_557482_4989' sendEvent='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854306_479138_4764'>
								<ownedComment xmi:type='uml:Comment' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854428_186831_5157' body='you send message without waiting for a response. Result may be received some time in a future'>
									<annotatedElement xmi:idref='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854445_117505_5254'/>
								</ownedComment>
							</message>
							<message xmi:type='uml:Message' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854481_264804_5344' name='asynchronous' visibility='public' messageSort='asynchCall' receiveEvent='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854428_607442_5159' sendEvent='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854344_881346_4937' signature='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854329_984570_4888'>
								<ownedComment xmi:type='uml:Comment' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854341_938891_4922' body='A call message represents the request to invoke a specific operation.&#10;'>
									<annotatedElement xmi:idref='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854481_264804_5344'/>
								</ownedComment>
							</message>
							<message xmi:type='uml:Message' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854439_209165_5198' name='selfOperation()' visibility='public' receiveEvent='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854453_766323_5276' sendEvent='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854342_317949_4929'/>
							<message xmi:type='uml:Message' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854428_932308_5160' name='create message' visibility='public' messageSort='createMessage' receiveEvent='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854342_346939_4932' sendEvent='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854477_935351_5313'>
								<ownedComment xmi:type='uml:Comment' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854450_156994_5266' body='A create message specifies the creation of a specific object with lifeline.&#10;'>
									<annotatedElement xmi:idref='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854428_932308_5160'/>
								</ownedComment>
							</message>
							<message xmi:type='uml:Message' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854362_829475_5009' name='delete message' visibility='public' messageSort='deleteMessage' receiveEvent='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854327_531543_4852' sendEvent='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854331_681188_4904'>
								<ownedComment xmi:type='uml:Comment' xmi:id='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854409_48849_5138' body='Delete message represents the destruction of the instance described by the lifeline.'>
									<annotatedElement xmi:idref='_18_0beta_8f90291_1393586854362_829475_5009'/>
								</ownedComment>
							</message>

		<geometry>28, 476, 553, 195</geometry>
		<mdOwnedViews/>
		<text>&lt;html&gt;
  &lt;head&gt;
		&lt;style&gt;
			p {padding:0px; margin:0px;}
		&lt;/style&gt;
	&lt;/head&gt;
  &lt;body&gt;
    &lt;p&gt;
&lt;b&gt;Conceptual Class Diagram&lt;/b&gt;
    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
Business analysts use class diagrams to create a conceptual domain model
    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
Contains no implementation details such as data types and access modifiers
    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
Contains only &amp;#8220;real world&amp;#8221; classes &amp;#8211; no &amp;#8220;programming&amp;#8221; classes
    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
&lt;b&gt;Design-Level Class Diagram&lt;/b&gt;
    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
Contains high-level programming classes or components
    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
Models only architecturally-significant features
    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
Data entity classes: focus on attributes and relationship details
    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
Service classes: focus on operations and inter-dependencies
    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
&lt;b&gt;Implementation Class Diagram&lt;/b&gt;
    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
Designers use class diagrams to model implementations to solve the problem
    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
Can contain all implementation details such as data types and access modifiers
    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
Can be used to generate code

    &lt;/p&gt;

  &lt;/body&gt;
&lt;/html&gt;
</text>
	</mdElement>

		<text>Can be used to describe the business and operational step-by-step workflows of components in a system. An activity diagram shows the overall flow of control.
